mapper.select: SELECT event_id AS eventId, employee_id AS employeeId, event_title AS eventTitle, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, event_category AS eventCategory, dept_id AS deptId, is_holiday AS isHoliday, created_at AS createdAt FROM calendar_event WHERE (SUBSTR(start_date, 1, 7) = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')) OR SUBSTR(end_date, 1, 7) = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'))) AND ( event_category = 'COMPANY' OR (event_category = 'PERSONAL' AND employee_id = #{viewerId}) OR (event_category = 'TEAM' AND dept_id = #{viewerDeptId}) )

SELECT event_id AS eventId, employee_id AS employeeId, event_title AS eventTitle, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, event_category AS eventCategory, dept_id AS deptId, is_holiday AS isHoliday, created_at AS createdAt FROM calendar_event WHERE event_id = #{eventId}

SELECT start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate FROM calendar_event WHERE event_category = 'COMPANY' AND is_holiday = 1 AND (SUBSTR(start_date, 1, 7) = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')) OR SUBSTR(end_date, 1, 7) = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar_event (employee_id, event_title, start_date, end_date, event_category, dept_id, is_holiday, created_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{eventTitle}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{eventCategory}, #{deptId}, #{isHoliday}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE calendar_event SET event_title = #{eventTitle}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, event_category = #{eventCategory}, dept_id = #{deptId}, is_holiday = #{isHoliday} WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
